attributes.title: _heading_traffic
attributes.visState: {"title": "_heading_traffic", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## Traffic"}}

attributes.description: MCP-origin CRUD op failure statuses over time (SUCCESS excluded). Filter: msg:"crud request log line" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "msg:\"crud request log line\" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: MCP CRUD Failure Status over Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP CRUD Failure Status over Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "status", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Volume of MCP tool invocations over time. Source: msg:"MCP tool called" (fires at start of execution, captures all calls including those that time out or crash). Filter: processType:mcpService AND msg:"MCP tool called"
attributes.title: MCP Tool Calls
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Calls", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "calls"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "calls", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Total tool call volume over the selected time window.
attributes.title: MCP Tool Calls (total)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Calls (total)", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "tool calls", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.description: Top 15 client user agents by tool call volume. Readable client names: Claude-User, openai-mcp/1.0.0, claude-code/*, python-httpx, Go-http-client, etc. 264 unique values (includes version numbers). Filter: processType:mcpService AND msg:"MCP tool called"
attributes.title: MCP Tool Calls by userAgent (top 15)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Calls by userAgent (top 15)", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "userAgent", "size": 15, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "calls"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "calls", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Error count split by exact HTTP statusCode on the /mcp route (4xx+5xx). Filter: processType:mcpService AND interServiceRoute:"/mcp" AND statusCode >= 400
attributes.title: MCP /mcp Errors by statusCode
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP /mcp Errors by statusCode", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusCode", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Top 10 user IDs by tool call volume. Filter: processType:mcpService AND msg:"MCP tool called"
attributes.title: MCP Tool Calls by userId (top 10)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Calls by userId (top 10)", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "userId", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "calls"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "calls", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: MCP-origin CRUD operations that did not succeed. Set dashboard time to 15m for on-call use.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "isFromMcpOrigin:true AND msg:\"crud request log line\" AND NOT status:SUCCESS", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: CRUD Failures
attributes.visState: {"title": "CRUD Failures", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "failures", "fontSize": 42}}}}

attributes.description: Approximate distinct session count (cardinality of browserId) on MCP tool calls. Rises when more users are active; compare against volume to distinguish "more users" from "same users calling more tools". Note: cardinality is approximate (HyperLogLog). Filter: processType:mcpService AND msg:"MCP tool called"
attributes.title: MCP Active Sessions over Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Active Sessions over Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "oauthAccessTokenId", "customLabel": "Active sessions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "sessions"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "sessions", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Fraction of the Node.js event loop actively executing (0–1). Sampled every 60 s from process-stats logs. Values near 1.0 indicate saturation. Filter: processType:mcpService AND usedHeapSizeBytes:*
attributes.title: MCP Event Loop Utilization by serviceId
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Event Loop Utilization by serviceId", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "eventLoopUtilization", "customLabel": "ELU"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "serviceId", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "utilization (0\u20131)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "utilization (0\u20131)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Stacked-percentage breakdown of /mcp HTTP requests by statusClass (success / client_error / server_error). Filter: processType:mcpService AND interServiceRoute:"/mcp" AND statusCode:*
attributes.title: MCP Request Error Rate (% by statusClass)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Request Error Rate (% by statusClass)", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusClass", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "percentage"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "% of requests"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Avg used and total heap across all MCP service instances. Filter: processType:mcpService AND usedHeapSizeBytes:*
attributes.title: MCP Service Heap Usage (global avg)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Service Heap Usage (global avg)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "usedHeapSizeBytes", "customLabel": "Used heap"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "totalHeapSizeBytes", "customLabel": "Total heap"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "bytes"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Used heap", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Total heap", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: p50 latency split by failure type. Errors (level:50) tend to be fast at p50 (~165ms) but have a heavier p99 tail. Validation failures are very fast (~1–20ms). Filter: processType:mcpService
attributes.title: MCP Tool Latency — Errors & Validation (p50 / p95 / p99)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Latency \u2014 Errors & Validation (p50 / p95 / p99)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "durationMs", "percents": [50, 95, 99], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Latency"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "filters", "schema": "group", "params": {"filters": [{"input": {"query": "msg:\"MCP tool completed with error\"", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "Completed with error"}, {"input": {"query": "msg:\"MCP tool input validation failed\"", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "Validation failed"}]}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: p95 queue length and p95 queue wait duration for MCP-origin CRUD requests. Spikes indicate back-pressure on the worker pool causing MCP timeouts. Filter: isFromMcpOrigin:true AND msg:"crud request log line"
attributes.title: MCP Worker Queue Pressure (p95)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Worker Queue Pressure (p95)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "queueLength", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Queue length p95"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "workerChildQueueDurationMs", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Queue wait p95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "p95"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "p95", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Queue wait p95 (ms)", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Count of server errors on the /mcp route. Set dashboard time to 15m for on-call use.
attributes.title: /mcp 5xx Count
attributes.visState: {"title": "/mcp 5xx Count", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "5xx errors", "fontSize": 42}}}}

attributes.description: CRUD op failures from MCP-origin requests, broken down by modelClassName, apiName (PUBLIC_API / PRIVATE_API), action, and status. Filter: msg:"crud request log line" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS. status values: OVER_LIMITS, INVALID_PERMISSIONS, NOT_FOUND, INVALID_DATA.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "msg:\"crud request log line\" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: MCP CRUD Failures by modelClassName / apiName / action
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP CRUD Failures by modelClassName / apiName / action", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "modelClassName", "size": 50, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "apiName", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "action", "size": 50, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "status", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"perPage": 25, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "sort": {"columnIndex": 4, "direction": "desc"}}}

attributes.title: _heading_errors

attributes.description: Tool call volume vs MCP-origin CRUD op volume over time. Ratio > 1 means tools are fanning out to multiple CRUD ops per call — spikes catch N+1 patterns. Fleet-wide; cannot split by tool until toolName is keyword-mapped.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "msg:\"MCP tool called\" OR (isFromMcpOrigin:true AND msg:\"crud request log line\")", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: MCP Tool Call → CRUD Fan-out (fleet)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Call \u2192 CRUD Fan-out (fleet)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "filters", "schema": "group", "params": {"filters": [{"input": {"query": "msg:\"MCP tool called\"", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "Tool calls"}, {"input": {"query": "isFromMcpOrigin:true AND msg:\"crud request log line\"", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "CRUD ops (MCP-origin)"}]}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Avg interactiveQueueingBlameMs and timeBlockingAnyInteractiveRequestMs for MCP-origin CRUD requests. Near-zero most of the time (0.3% of requests are non-zero), but spikes indicate MCP traffic blocking the interactive queue. Max observed: 408s blame, 199s blocking. Filter: isFromMcpOrigin:true AND msg:"crud request log line"
attributes.title: MCP Interactive Queue Blame (p95)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Interactive Queue Blame (p95)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "interactiveQueueingBlameMs", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Queue blame p95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "timeBlockingAnyInteractiveRequestMs", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Blocking time p95 (ms)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Blocking time p95 (ms)", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Non-success MCP-origin CRUD ops split by modelClassName then action. Each line is one (model, action) combination. Filter: msg:"crud request log line" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "msg:\"crud request log line\" AND isFromMcpOrigin:true AND NOT status:SUCCESS", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
